finding_results.notes: Noor now leaves because Marcus is actively crashing and holds a time-sensitive corroborating detail Suki needs for the write-up. The scene states why they cannot wait, why they cannot both leave the live analysis station, and the attacker explicitly acts on Ember's lie about Noor having gone to Marcus for the route.
The reconstruction of Suki's last instant now remains in present tense with the surrounding narration.
Post-revision count leaves one instance of 'still' in the chapter, below the packet threshold of twelve.

summary: Reworked the separation so Noor leaves on a time-sensitive Marcus corroboration run while Suki keeps the live analysis station open, tied the stabbing to that exact opening, fixed the lone past-tense intrusion in the death beat, and reduced 'still' density from twenty-eight instances to one.
